```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Design microservice architecture with bounded contexts"
---
# Microservice Architecture
## Task
Design microservice architecture using DDD bounded contexts.
## Requirements
1. Identify bounded contexts from domain. 2. Define service boundaries.
3. Design API contracts between services. 4. Implement async communication where appropriate.
5. Handle distributed transactions with sagas.
## Constraints
- One service per bounded context. API-first design. Async for non-critical flows.
## Success Criteria
- Services have clear boundaries. Contracts defined. Communication patterns documented.
```
